intro: Hunger, fire, chaos — survive it all
description:
The ship has been looted. The crew is gone. You are the only one who survived.

During the night, pirates attacked the vessel. They took everything of value, destroyed the equipment, and captured the crew. You survived only because you managed to hide in the ship’s dark compartments.

When the silence returned, it became clear — there was no one to call for help.

Your first objective is to repair the emergency radio and send a distress signal. The first days of survival will be spent searching for intact parts, restoring power, and making risky trips into damaged sections of the ship.

But the signal is only the beginning.

Rescuers are on their way…
You just don’t know when they will arrive.

While you wait, the ship slowly dies along with you.
Supplies are limited, systems continue to fail, and at any moment a fire may break out or another авария may occur. The pirates may return — to check the ship or finish off the one who was left behind.

You will have to:

- survive by managing hunger and thirst

- extinguish fires and deal with emergencies

- defend yourself against repeated attacks

Every day is a trial.

You don’t know how long you must endure.
You know only one thing — if you give up too soon, rescue will never come.
